item.name: Fishmonger
item.description:
Known for its habit of seeking out a variety of fish, though unlike its namesake, these are purely for its own consumption.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: Like its goosefish brethren, the fishmonger is a rapacious eater, and certainly not a particular one. Cutting a fishmonger open, one will find the remains of other fish, sharks, mollusks, the occasional Lalafell─a veritable fisher's market of the southern seas.
